properties.displayName: App Service apps should be injected into a virtual network.
properties.description: This policy applies exclusively to Mission Platform products and services; usage outside of these scopes is not supported. Injecting App Service Apps in a virtual network unlocks advanced App Service networking and security features and provides you with greater control over your network security configuration. Learn more at: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/app-service/web-sites-integrate-with-vnet.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
